{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eyes of the Deep
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eyes of the Deep]] record and gather knowledge to contribute to a collective.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eyes of the Deep]] soothe [[Orthos]]' spirit.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eyes of the Deep]] compile and compare memories.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
